column29:
I am happy to do an ABC exchange. Sharing my criteria for such collaborations

  ## Taking a link

  1. DR > 70
  2. Websites should be related to Marketing SAAS software, marketing/social media agencies/blogging websites.
  3. Top 5 regions traffic is coming from are USA, UK, EU, ME, Africa
  4. No traffic from certain countries (Pakistan, Iran, Iraq, Ukraine, Afghanistan, Kazakhstan etc).
  5. Domain age > 5 years
  6. Minimum traffic > 5K/ month
  7. Minimum page traffic : 20+
  8. Some records on Ahrefs


  ## Giving a link

  1. DR > 60
  2. Give link to informational content only
  3. Minor content change is allowed (Shouldn't change the context)
  4. No direct/ reciprocal exchanges
  5. Preferable SAAS & B2B sites
  6. No link exchange from these pages
    a. /Tools
    b. /Alternatives
    c. /Comment management
    d. /Review management
    e. /Reputation management

  Please share thoughts

column29:
Guest Posting on AITopTools.com
 
⚠️ Important Disclaimer
Payment is due in full, upfront, before any work goes live.
Unfortunately, due to repeated instances of dishonesty in the backlinks/guest posting industry, we no longer accept submissions or perform work without confirmed payment. Any attempt to bypass or delay payment will result in immediate rejection of your request.
 
Contribution Terms
Topic
Must be AI-focused (tools, trends, insights, innovations).
Length
800–1,200 words of original, high-quality content.
Links
Relevant backlinks are allowed (no spam, fluff, or blatant promotion).
Format
Well-structured with clear headers, subheads, and bullet points.
Fee
$150 — includes full review, publishing, and promotion.
Exposure
Published on a DR 54+ site with thousands of monthly readers.
Backlink-Only Option
Backlinks can be placed in existing blog posts for $50 each.
Process
Once submitted, articles will be reviewed.
If accepted, they will be scheduled for publication promptly after payment is received.
Important: Do not contact us to negotiate a lower price. Such emails will not receive a response.

Our team reviews each submission and will decline any post/link they think does not fit well. If you are unsure if the topic/link will be accepted, please send it to us in advance before writing the piece. TOT is usually 24-48 hours. No sponsored tag will be added to the article. There will be an affiliate disclosure included at the top, as we have ads and affiliates on the website. This does not mean the article is sponsored, so please make sure you know the difference.
